data.content: Fixed terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts: replaced vi.importActual with explicit mock stubs, replaced vi.mocked with direct casts, updated rollback test assertions to verify rollbackBeatState mock instead of exec/backend.update, and added test asserting [agent: Codex] label appears in Claimed and TAKE log lines. All 9 tests pass under vitest. Commit e782dbc362be pushed to main.
